input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.7.3
            TITLE: the front hoop must extend from the lowest frame member on one side of the frame, up,

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.7.3: The Front Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member on one side of the Frame, up,
F.5.7.3 The Front Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member on one side of the Frame, up, 
over and down to the lowest Frame Member on the other side of the Frame.

final_answer: The Front Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member on one side of the Frame, up, over and down to the lowest Frame Member on the other side of the Frame.
